check_rows.detail: pair-binding patch should follow a split fixed/loss signal
source replay comparison must be ready
patch should not replace holdout after recovery

interpretation.reason: The patch reinforces fixed loss as an ordered pair on the replay failure surfaces, but capability still requires training and replay.
